mapper.insert: insert into ai_llm_call_log( conversation_id, user_id, thread_id, agent_name, round_no, status, request_payload_json, response_payload_json, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, error_message, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{threadId}, #{agentName}, #{roundNo}, #{status}, #{requestPayloadJson}, #{responsePayloadJson}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{errorMessage}, #{deleted}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select max(round_no) from ai_llm_call_log where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update ai_llm_call_log set status = #{status}, response_payload_json = #{responsePayloadJson}, prompt_tokens = #{promptTokens}, completion_tokens = #{completionTokens}, total_tokens = #{totalTokens}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update ai_llm_call_log set status = 'ERROR', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
